prompt: Create a vertical anime-style romantic night illustration of a young adult couple sitting together on the hood of a glossy black sedan parked in a seaside overlook parking lot. The taller man sits behind and slightly to the left, wearing a light gray denim jacket over a white hoodie, blue jeans, and casual sneakers; he has chin-length pale blue-silver hair with subtle red tips. The woman sits in front of him, wearing a cropped white denim jacket over a black top, fitted light blue jeans, white sneakers, and small earrings; she has long wavy burgundy-purple hair with orange-red ends and a braided crown detail. Their bodies are close, his arms gently around her as they clasp hands together in a tender pose, both looking upward. Cover each face with a soft square privacy blur/mosaic block. The background is a deep blue star-filled sky over the ocean, with a bright shooting star with a long glowing trail crossing the upper sky, moonlit water shimmering on the horizon, faint clouds, and road markings in the parking area. Use polished high-detail Japanese anime rendering, cinematic lighting, cool blue night tones, soft highlights on the car, delicate romantic atmosphere, clean linework, and a tall smartphone wallpaper composition.
